_publications._publicationTitle: Nf2/Merlin controls spinal cord neural progenitor function in a Rac1/ErbB2-dependent manner.

_contextSnippet: pharmacologic Rac1 inhibition (NSC23766) decreased Nf2-deficient NPC neurosphere diameters...and glial differentiation...to WT levels...pharmacologic Rac1 inhibition decreased ErbB2 activity
details: Pharmacologic Rac1 inhibition decreased Nf2-deficient NPC neurosphere diameters and glial differentiation to WT levels, and decreased ErbB2 activity
